parameters.url: =https://jmdyhxebcosyjyafzsss.supabase.co/rest/v1/morning_reactions?child_id=eq.{{ $('Calculate Week Range').first().json.childId }}&generated_at=gte.{{ $('Calculate Week Range').first().json.weekStartISO }}&generated_at=lte.{{ $('Calculate Week Range').first().json.weekEndISO }}&order=generated_at.asc

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ child_id: $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json.childId, user_id: $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json.userId, week_start_date: $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json.weekStartDate, week_end_date: $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json.weekEndDate, brief_content: $json.briefContent, session_count: $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json.sessionCount }) }}
